body: Thanks so much for following up, Amara — I really appreciated our conversation last week and wanted to keep the momentum going on [CarbonLedger](carbonledger.co). We've just closed out our October numbers and the data is honestly stronger than I expected: annualized ARR is tracking at $1.2M, up about 40% from the quarter prior, and enterprise churn has been essentially zero. I know you mentioned [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) is particularly focused on climate infrastructure plays that have a clear path to regulatory tailwinds, and I think the new SEC climate disclosure rules put us in a really interesting position heading into 2026. I'd love to get a proper pitch on the calendar before the holidays — would a 45-minute call the week of December 2nd work for your schedule? Happy to send over our updated deck and data room access in advance so you can come in fully up to speed.
